tools.name: hsh-company-intelligence
tools.description: Real-time intelligence on a startup/company by name or domain. Returns: profile, founders, tech stack, hiring signals, YC batch. Supports lookup (1 company) or discover (filtered list). Pay per call via x402 (USDC on Base).

tools.name: hsh-b2b-contact
tools.description: Verified B2B contact records: name + business email + company. SMTP-validated emails (bounce rate <3%). Industry/title filters. Per-record pricing scales with quantity. Tier 1: 1-50 records ($3-15). Tier 2: 51-5000 records ($15-500). Tier 3: 5001-100K ($250-3000).

tools.name: hsh-b2b-enriched
tools.description: Multi-source enriched B2B records: name + email + LinkedIn URL + title + company size + industry. Cross-referenced from 3+ sources for accuracy. Tier 1: 1-50 ($3-15). Tier 2: 51-5000 ($15-500). Tier 3: 5001-100K ($250-3000).

tools.name: hsh-b2b-full
tools.description: Deep enrichment: name + email + phone + LinkedIn + firmographic data + tech stack signals + funding history + revenue estimates. Multi-source fusion (5+ sources). For sales teams that need everything. Tier 2: $15-500 (small batch). Tier 3: $250-3000 (high volume).

tools.name: hsh-web-scrape
tools.description: Custom web scraping: extract structured data from any public site or directory. Handles static HTML, JS-rendered, paginated, and basic anti-bot. Pricing per record + complexity multiplier (1.0-2.5x). Tier 1: $3-15 (50 records). Tier 2: $15-500 (5K records). Tier 3: $250-3000 (100K).

tools.name: hsh-monitoring
tools.description: Continuous URL/page monitoring with change detection. Daily, hourly, or real-time snapshots. Webhook alerts on diff. Includes screenshot archive. Priced per URL per month ($10/URL/month, 15% off for 6+ month commits).

tools.name: hsh-custom-dataset
tools.description: Novel datasets that don't exist anywhere yet: cross-domain fusion, industry-specific schemas, real-time aggregated intelligence. Setup fee $500 + per-record $0.20. Includes parser dev, QA, and documentation. Tier 3 ($250-3000) for small custom builds, Tier 4 (human-scoped) for novel/large.

tools.name: hsh-finetune-dataset
tools.description: Made-to-order, answer-verified datasets for LLM fine-tuning. Describe the task (e.g. 'step-by-step math reasoning', 'SQL generation', 'instruction-following for support replies') and we deliver a clean, HuggingFace-ready dataset in Alpaca schema (instruction/input/output), deduplicated, train/val/te

tools.name: hsh-crypto-intel
tools.description: Complete crypto intel for trading agents. Three layers in one call: (1) cross-exchange POSITIONING — Binance + Bybit funding, open interest, price fused into a signal (overheated-long/short, cross-exchange dislocation); (2) ON-CHAIN whale activity — large confirmed BTC transactions from the latest b

tools.name: hsh-india-announcements
tools.description: Live NSE corporate-announcement intel for Indian listed companies. Each announcement is classified by event type (dividend, earnings, board_meeting, M&A, fundraise, order_win, buyback, investor_meet, management_change, credit_rating) and tagged with sentiment + a plain-English impact summary. Option

tools.name: hsh-india-fundamentals
tools.description: Indian listed-company fundamentals from NSE official XBRL filings — primary regulatory disclosures, no third-party data. Quarterly P&L (revenue, net profit, EPS, net margin) with YoY and QoQ growth, PLUS the annual balance sheet (assets, equity, debt, current assets/liabilities, cash) and self-compu

tools.name: hsh-mena-intel
tools.description: MENA (Gulf) market intelligence for trading agents. Combines the signals that actually drive Gulf markets: OIL (Brent + WTI, latest price + 30-day trend + derived Gulf-equity impact — oil is the dominant Gulf market driver), SOVEREIGN MACRO (GDP growth, inflation, GDP size per country from World Ban

tools.name: hsh-esg-events
tools.description: Authoritative company-attributed ESG material-event intel for US-listed companies. Sourced from SEC EDGAR 8-K + SD filings (companies disclosing their own material events): governance changes, restatements, auditor changes, bankruptcy/debt triggers, material impairments, litigation/other-material-ev

tools.name: hsh-hiring-signal
tools.description: Multi-signal alt-data intel for investment research. Combines up to six independent free signals into one call: (1) HIRING posture across Greenhouse + Lever + Ashby job boards (gtm_expansion / product_build / balanced_growth / hiring_freeze from department mix); (2) INSIDER activity from SEC Form 4

tools.name: hsh-shariah-screen
tools.description: Rule-based Shariah (Islamic finance) compliance screen for US-listed companies. Applies AAOIFI-style screening using authoritative SEC financials: (1) business-activity screen (flags alcohol, tobacco, gambling, conventional banking/insurance, pork, weapons, adult), (2) financial ratio screens (debt/

tools.name: hsh-esg-news
tools.description: EU & global ESG controversy intel for compliance and trading agents. Detects company ESG controversies (environmental, social, governance) from worldwide news in real time, then enriches each with GLEIF entity resolution (LEI + country of domicile) and EU sanctions-list screening. Pillar-classified,

tools.name: hsh-cricket-fantasy-picks
tools.description: Fantasy cricket picks + captain for a T20 match. Ranks players by predicted fantasy value and names the optimal captain (35.6% captain-hit, 2x random). Dream11-style. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-chase-winprob
tools.description: Real-time chase win-probability for a T20 run chase, updated per ball. Model AUC 0.88, beats run-rate heuristic by 8.6pts. In-play betting signal. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-momentum
tools.description: Momentum & pressure index for a live T20 chase — quantifies which side is gaining (the swing signal) plus a pressure score. In-play trader signal. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-parscore
tools.description: Par-score / projected first-innings total from any mid-innings state. Accurate to +/-8.6 runs in death overs, beats naive extrapolation by 10.6 runs. Over/under betting signal. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-timeline
tools.description: Over-by-over win-probability timeline (the broadcast 'worm') for a full T20 chase. Media/broadcast-grade. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-matchup
tools.description: Batter-vs-bowler head-to-head record (111K pairs, Bayesian-adjusted): balls, runs, dismissals, dominance score. Fantasy + in-play edge. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-first-winprob
tools.description: First-innings win-probability while a team is still setting a total (AUC 0.76, uses venue + team strength). Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-form
tools.description: Player form & fatigue rating (hot/cold form + bowling-workload fatigue flag) for established IPL players. Fantasy signal. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh-cricket-chase-difficulty
tools.description: Chase difficulty rating at the innings break — grades how hard a target is (Easy to Very Hard) from historical chase-success data. Pay per call via x402.

tools.name: hsh_describe_data_need
tools.description: FREE. Describe any data need in plain language and receive an instant firm quote from HSH Intelligence Data-on-Demand: price in USDC, scope, a frozen quote_ref, and a pay_url. Pay the quote via x402 (USDC on Base or Solana) at the pay_url to place the order; delivery in 24h. Use this BEFORE purchasi

tools.name: hsh_list_capabilities
tools.description: FREE. List HSH Intelligence's catalogued data capabilities with live pricing, plus how to order custom data.

tools.name: hsh_check_quote
tools.description: FREE. Check a quote_ref from hsh_describe_data_need: status, frozen price, expiry, and pay_url if still payable.

tools.name: hsh_subscribe_data_feed
tools.description: FREE. Register a STANDING subscription so HSH watches for events matching your interest (e.g. SEC filings by form type and/or ticker/sector keywords) and sends you a quote the moment a match is caught. Turns one-off data buying into an always-on feed. Pay per matched delivery via x402.

tools.name: hsh_check_subscription
tools.description: FREE. Check a subscription by its sub_ref (HSHSUB-XXXXXXXXXX): what it's watching, status, and match criteria.

tools.name: hsh_broker_data_request
tools.description: Route a data need through HSH (the data-fulfillment layer for agents). HSH checks its warm inventory first — if a matching product is pre-positioned, you get an immediate-fulfillment quote; otherwise a fresh-fulfillment quote. Use this when you need data mid-task and want HSH to fulfill it.

tools.name: hsh_check_order
tools.description: FREE. Check fulfillment status of a paid order by its order reference (HSH-XXXXXXXX).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: hsh-web-scrape · Private data: hsh-b2b-contact, hsh-b2b-enriched, hsh-web-scrape, hsh-custom-dataset, hsh-cricket-matchup · Public sink: hsh-b2b-contact, hsh-b2b-enriched, hsh-b2b-full, hsh-monitoring, hsh-crypto-intel, hsh-cricket-timeline · Destructive: hsh-finetune-dataset, hsh-cricket-chase-winprob.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: hsh-web-scrape · Private data: hsh-b2b-contact, hsh-b2b-enriched, hsh-web-scrape, hsh-custom-dataset, hsh-cricket-matchup · Public sink: hsh-b2b-contact, hsh-b2b-enriched, hsh-b2b-full, hsh-monitoring, hsh-crypto-intel, hsh-cricket-timeline · Destructive: hsh-finetune-dataset, hsh-cricket-chase-winprob

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
